primary_accounting_issue: Appréciation du critère SPPI (« prêt basique ») pour un actif financier comportant des clauses contractuelles contingentes pouvant modifier le calendrier ou le montant des flux de trésorerie, et incidence sur sa catégorie de mesure IFRS 9.

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule by selecting IFRS 9 as the single governing lineage because it directly governs classification of financial assets, including the SPPI assessment and resulting measurement categories, and no overlapping higher-precedence document competes with it on this issue.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low — the question is squarely about SPPI and contractual cash flow characteristics of a financial asset, which are directly governed by IFRS 9.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern the SPPI test for contractual features that can change cash flow timing or amount and the resulting measurement categories for financial assets.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify how to analyse basic lending features, modified time value of money, prepayment and extension clauses, contingent triggers, and examples of SPPI and non-SPPI outcomes.

peripheral_authority.reason: This document addresses measurement of insurance contracts, not SPPI classification of financial assets.
This document addresses earnings per share and potential ordinary shares, not the SPPI assessment or financial asset classification.
This document addresses hedge accounting rather than the IFRS 9 SPPI classification question raised here.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets measured at amortised cost when the business model is to hold to collect and contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest
Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income when the business model is both collect and sell and contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest
Residual measurement basis for financial assets when the SPPI condition is not met or the business model does not qualify for the other categories

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level measurement category when the financial asset passes SPPI and is held in a hold-to-collect business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a top-level measurement category when the financial asset passes SPPI and is managed in a collect-and-sell business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual top-level measurement category, including where contractual features are inconsistent with a basic lending arrangement.
